description: Test vectors for the `plan_hash` claim on `governance_context` JWS tokens (see AdCP Signed Governance Context profile). Each vector pins a canonical plan JSON document, its RFC 8785 (JCS) canonicalized byte form, and the hex-encoded lowercase SHA-256 of those bytes. Governance agents issuing tokens and sellers verifying them MUST reproduce the `expected_plan_hash` value for each `plan` input byte-for-byte; any divergence indicates a non-conformant canonicalization implementation. Intent-phase tokens bind the hash of the plan as approved; `modification`-phase tokens bind the hash of the post-update plan state (see vector `mod-bid-price-budget-increase`). The `plan` field in each vector represents the `plans[i]` element from a `sync_plans` request with governance-agent-assigned and seller-side-annotation fields stripped per the scope rules.

vectors.description: Representative intent-phase plan: multi-channel (CTV + web display), North America markets, two packages, one policy reference set, reallocation threshold set.

plan.objectives: Q2 awareness push across CTV and web display for North America

vectors.expected_jcs_bytes: {"brand":{"brand_id":"acme","domain":"acme.example"},"budget":{"currency":"USD","per_seller_max_pct":40,"reallocation_threshold":50000,"total":250000},"channels":{"allowed":["ctv","web_display"]},"flight":{"end":"2026-06-30T23:59:59Z","start":"2026-04-01T00:00:00Z"},"human_review_required":false,"markets":["US","CA"],"objectives":"Q2 awareness push across CTV and web display for North America","packages":[{"budget":150000,"channel":"ctv","daily_cap":2500,"package_id":"pkg_ctv_primetime"},{"budget":100000,"channel":"web_display","package_id":"pkg_web_display"}],"plan_id":"plan_acme_q2_2026","policy_ids":["registry:brand-safety:gp-1","registry:privacy:coppa"]}

vectors.description: Modification-phase vector: the `intent-multichannel-ctv-display` plan with `packages[0].bid_price` added and `packages[0].budget` increased from 150000 to 180000. Bound to a `modification`-phase token's `plan_hash` claim; the buyer applies the patch locally before calling `check_governance` with `phase: "modification"`.

plan.objectives: Q2 awareness push across CTV and web display for North America

vectors.expected_jcs_bytes: {"brand":{"brand_id":"acme","domain":"acme.example"},"budget":{"currency":"USD","per_seller_max_pct":40,"reallocation_threshold":50000,"total":250000},"channels":{"allowed":["ctv","web_display"]},"flight":{"end":"2026-06-30T23:59:59Z","start":"2026-04-01T00:00:00Z"},"human_review_required":false,"markets":["US","CA"],"objectives":"Q2 awareness push across CTV and web display for North America","packages":[{"bid_price":18.5,"budget":180000,"channel":"ctv","daily_cap":2500,"package_id":"pkg_ctv_primetime"},{"budget":100000,"channel":"web_display","package_id":"pkg_web_display"}],"plan_id":"plan_acme_q2_2026","policy_ids":["registry:brand-safety:gp-1","registry:privacy:coppa"]}

vectors.description: Minimum-field plan exercising only `plan_id`, `budget` (with `reallocation_threshold`), and `flight`. Included to pin the canonical form for the smallest plan shape a governance agent would sign.

Exercises JCS unicode handling (literal UTF-8 in `objectives` and brand fields; JCS emits literal UTF-8, not `\uXXXX` escapes) and number canonicalization (`total: 1.0` serializes to `1` per RFC 8785 number rules). Implementations that emit `\u65e5...` or `1.0` instead are non-conformant.
